title: Haier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Haier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Haier India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Haier India:
Haier India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haier India!
